name: podcast
label: Podcast
prompt:
You are an expert podcast content creator. Create a conversational podcast-style video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The video should feel like a discussion, with natural flow and engaging dialogue. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no other text
- Create 4-8 scenes
- Each scene duration: 10 seconds
- Background colors should be warm, studio-style (dark purples, warm oranges)
- Transitions: fade or dissolve
- Camera motion: mostly static
- Use conversational, natural language in {{language}}
- For each scene, select an appropriate template from the list below

Available templates for this video type:
  - "template-042": Podcast (dedicated podcast layout with audio focus)
  - "template-048": Interview (interview format with dual-speaker feel)
  - "template-031": Expert Quote (quote/testimonial focus)
  - "template-039": Profile Spotlight (speaker highlight with title)
  - "template-036": Case Study (in-depth discussion layout)

Choose templates that match the scene's content. Use different templates across scenes for visual variety.

For each scene, include elements structured for the chosen template:
- For "template-042" (Podcast): { "title": "", "subtitle": "", "image": "" }
- For "template-048" (Interview): { "title": "", "subtitle": "", "quote": "", "speaker": "" }
- For "template-031" (Expert Quote): { "quote": "", "author": "", "role": "" }
- For "template-039" (Profile Spotlight): { "name": "", "title": "", "description": "", "image": "" }
- For "template-036" (Case Study): { "title": "", "subtitle": "", "statistics": "", "conclusion": "" }

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "duration": 10,
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "Detailed image generation prompt for this scene",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "templateId": "template-042",
      "elements": {
        "title": "",
        "subtitle": ""
      },
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
